catalog_content:
Item Name: Nespresso Capsules Original Line, Volluto Decaffeinato Mild Roast Coffee, 50 Count Coffee Pods
Bullet Point 1: SWEET ; LIGHT:;This;Nespresso;decaf espresso is sweet and smooth, rich and round, just like Volluto - but without caffeine.
Bullet Point 2: LIGHT ROAST: Volluto Decaffeinato is split roasted to bring out the unique characteristics of each coffee. A short roast unfolds the sweet biscuit notes of the Brazilian Arabica. The finer fruit aromatics you taste from the Colombian Arabica coffee are developed in its longer light roast.; Intensity 4.
Bullet Point 3: VOLLUTO DECAFFEINATO COFFEE BREWS 1.35 FL. OZ.: These Nespresso OriginalLine pods are part of the Decaffeinato range that will provide you with a 1.35 fl. oz. serving of a decaf coffee beverage.
Bullet Point 4: SAVOR WITH MILK: Every;Nespresso;coffee is created to taste great both as a black coffee and as part of a milk with coffee recipe.
Bullet Point 5: SUSTAINABILITY FIRST:;As a certified B Corporation,;Nespresso;meets the highest standards of verified social and environmental performance, joining a global movement using business as a force for good.;;Nespresso aluminum capsules are fully recyclable and guarantee coffee freshness - we provide different options for recycling your used aluminum coffee pods to fulfill our collective commitment to protecting the environment.
Bullet Point 6: MACHINE COMPATIBILITY:;Nespresso;Original pods are not compatible with Vertuo machines.
Value: 50.0

overall_summary: Premium decaffeinated coffee capsules from Nespresso, positioned as a high-quality, sustainable product. The B Corporation certification and recyclable aluminum packaging highlight environmental and ethical commitments. The 50-count bundle offers convenience and value for coffee enthusiasts, with a focus on flavor and compatibility with Nespresso OriginalLine machines.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Litehouse Freeze Dried Parsley - Substitute for Fresh Parsley, Jar Equal to 3 Parsley Fresh Bunches, Organic, Parsley Seasoning, Non-GMO, Gluten-Free - 0.53 Ounce
Bullet Point 1: FREEZE DRIED DIFFERENCE - All of our herbs are harvested at their peak freshness and loaded into our freeze drying tunnels that help preserve the bold color, taste, & aroma
Bullet Point 2: SUBSTITUTE & ENJOY - Simply substitute 1 tablespoon of the freeze-dried herb for 1 tablespoon of fresh Parsley. Our Freeze Dried Parsley makes a subtle addition to soups, salad dressings or eggs
Bullet Point 3: HIGH QUALITY CROPS - Litehouse Herbs are harvested from the highest quality crops making our Freeze Dried Parsley Non-GMO, gluten-free, vegetarian, & keto friendly
Bullet Point 4: TASTY TIP - Litehouse Freeze Dried Parsley works great in place of fresh Parsley and can be added to enhance homemade salsa or pasta sauce
Bullet Point 5: ABOUT US - Our mission is to deliver a memorable eating experience, positively impact communities, and provide employee-owners with opportunities for success
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Mid-tier specialty herb product with organic and non-GMO certifications, positioned as a premium alternative to fresh parsley. Glass jar packaging and freeze-drying process suggest higher quality and longer shelf life. Pricing may reflect the convenience and quality of the product compared to fresh herbs.
